full_text:
Chen Wen (Yuanti) 陳溫 (元悌)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Wen (陳溫), styledYuanti (元悌), was born in Runan. Inspector of Yang, he helped Cao Hong raise troops and died of illness. Chen Wen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chen Wen lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
